lede: A look at April 27 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Mathys Tel and Daniel Holdsworth (rugby league), and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2026 Bekasi train collision
events.desc: A train crash kills at least 15 people and injures 84 others near Jakarta, Indonesia.

events.title: 2012 Dnipropetrovsk explosions
events.desc: At least four explosions hit the Ukrainian city of Dnipropetrovsk with at least 27 people injured.

events.title: 2011 Super Outbreak
events.desc: The 2011 Super Outbreak devastates parts of the Southeastern United States, especially the states of Alabama, Mississippi, Georgia, and Tennessee. Two hundred five tornadoes touched down on April 27 alone, killing more than 300 and injuring hundreds more.

events.title: Airbus A380
events.desc: Airbus A380 aircraft has its maiden test flight.

events.title: Zambia national football team
events.desc: Most of the Zambia national football team lose their lives in a plane crash off Libreville, Gabon en route to Dakar, Senegal to play a 1994 FIFA World Cup qualifying match against Senegal.

events.title: Expo 67
events.desc: Expo 67 officially opens in Montreal, Quebec, Canada with a large opening ceremony broadcast around the world. It opens to the public the next day.

events.title: Benito Mussolini
events.desc: World War II: Benito Mussolini is arrested by Italian partisans in Dongo, while attempting escape disguised as a German soldier.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: German troops enter Athens.

events.title: Second Guangzhou Uprising
events.desc: The Second Canton Uprising takes place in Guangzhou, Qing China, but is suppressed.

events.title: First Barbary War
events.desc: First Barbary War: United States Marines and Berbers attack the Tripolitan city of Derna (The "shores of Tripoli" in the Marines' Hymn).

births.name: Basil A. Paterson
births.line: American lawyer and politician, 59th Secretary of State of New York (died 2014)

births.name: Lim Bo Seng
births.line: Chinese businessman, resistance fighter of Force 136 and war hero of Singapore (died 1944)

deaths.text: Jiggly Caliente, Filipino-American drag performer, singer and actress
Gerard K. O'Neill, American physicist and astronomer

observances.text: Christian feast days: Blessed María Antonia Bandrés Elósegui
Christian feast days: Blessed Osanna of Cattaro
